# Table Stress Test

## Simple table (content-fitted)

| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Headings | Done |
| Paragraphs | Done |
| Code Blocks | Done |
| Lists | Done |

## Table with inline formatting

| Syntax | Example | Output |
|--------|---------|--------|
| **Bold** | `**text**` | **rendered bold** |
| *Italic* | `*text*` | *rendered italic* |
| ~~Strike~~ | `~~text~~` | ~~rendered strike~~ |
| `Code` | `` `text` `` | `rendered code` |
| [Link](https://example.com) | `[text](url)` | clickable |

## Table with alignment

| Left | Center | Right |
|:-----|:------:|------:|
| a | b | c |
| longer text | centered | 123 |
| x | y | z |

## Wide table (should wrap)

| Component | Description | Status | Notes |
|-----------|-------------|--------|-------|
| Markdown Parser | Converts raw markdown text into an abstract syntax tree using remark-parse and remark-gfm | Complete | Uses unified.js pipeline with rehype-highlight for syntax coloring |
| IR Compiler | Transforms hast nodes into renderer-agnostic intermediate representation with pre-resolved theme styles | Complete | Handles block and inline nodes with ancestor tracking |
| OpenTUI Renderer | Renders IR nodes to terminal UI using React reconciler with box, text, and scrollbox primitives | In Progress | Table rendering uses measure-then-render for character-precise alignment |
| Theme System | Provides color tokens for all components using Tokyo Night inspired dark palette | Complete | RPG rarity heading colors from legendary orange to mundane dimmed |
